app.title: CSR Matrix Generator
app.translatingReport: Translating report to the selected language...
app.learnMore: Learn more about the CSR Matrix

csrInfo.heroDesc: Streamline your QMS by automatically merging IATF 16949 requirements with the latest Customer Specific Requirements (CSR) from all major OEMs.
csrInfo.outputPdfDesc: A high-level overview of your compliance landscape and risk profile, ready for management review.
csrInfo.outputExcelDesc: Detailed mapping, implementation tracking, and gap analysis in a professional, filterable format.
csrInfo.disciplinesTitle: Everything you need for CSR compliance
csrInfo.disciplinesSub: Our generator covers every aspect of managing Customer Specific Requirements, from initial mapping to audit preparation.
csrInfo.d1Desc: Access the latest requirements from BMW, Mercedes, VW, Ford, and more in one place.
csrInfo.d2Desc: Upload your process map and let AI automatically link requirements to your specific departments.
csrInfo.d3Desc: Spot contradictions between different OEM requirements on the same IATF chapters instantly.
csrInfo.d4Desc: Requirements are categorized by risk level (Critical to Low) to prioritize your actions.
csrInfo.d5Desc: Track implementation status and document evidence directly within the matrix preview.
csrInfo.d6Desc: Export professional files that meet the strictest requirements of IATF 16949 audits.
csrInfo.d7Desc: Automatically compare with older versions to see what's new, changed, or removed.
csrInfo.d8Desc: Generate your matrix in English or German with a single click, perfectly translated.
csrInfo.howTitle: From Selection to Export in 3 Steps
csrInfo.step1Desc: Choose your customers and the relevant IATF 16949 chapters you want to cover.
csrInfo.step2Desc: Upload your process landscape or use our automotive template for AI mapping.
csrInfo.step3Desc: Review the generated matrix, set implementation status, and download your files.
csrInfo.pricingNote: Prices in EUR plus VAT where applicable. Instant credit delivery after payment.
csrInfo.sampleDesc: Download a sample CSR Matrix to see the level of detail, formatting, and AI mapping quality we provide.
csrInfo.faq1Q: Which OEMs are included in the database?
csrInfo.faq1A: We cover all major automotive OEMs including BMW, Volkswagen Group (Audi, Porsche, etc.), Mercedes-Benz, Ford, Stellantis, and many Tier-1 suppliers.
csrInfo.faq2Q: How often is the requirement database updated?
csrInfo.faq2A: Our database is monitored weekly for new OEM releases and Sanctioned Interpretations (SIs) from the IATF. Updates are pushed automatically to the generator.
csrInfo.faq3Q: Can I use my own process map?
csrInfo.faq3A: Yes! You can upload an image of your process map or enter your processes manually. Our AI will handle the mapping to the CSR requirements.
csrInfo.faq4Q: What format are the exports in?
csrInfo.faq4A: You receive a professional Excel file (.xlsx) with multiple tabs (Matrix, Conflicts, Owners) and a high-level PDF summary report.
csrInfo.faq5A: No. We believe in pay-per-use. You buy credits and only spend them when you actually generate a new matrix or a major update.
csrInfo.finalCtaDesc: Join hundreds of quality managers who have automated their CSR mapping and audit preparation.

csrUnlock.heading: CSR Matrix Generator
csrUnlock.subtitle: Enter your access code to generate your CSR matrix
csrUnlock.label: Access Code
csrUnlock.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

csr.step1Desc: Choose the OEM customers whose customer-specific requirements (CSR) you need to cover. The matrix will merge IATF 16949 base requirements with OEM-specific additions.
csr.optionalInfoDesc: This information will appear in the Excel header. You can leave it empty.
csr.selectAtLeastOneOem: Please select at least one OEM.
csr.step2Desc: Enter the processes from your company's process map. Each CSR requirement will be mapped to the affected processes. You can load a standard template as a starting point.
csr.templateProcessesDesc: Load a standard automotive supplier process map (COP + support processes). You can customize it afterwards.
csr.processMapImageDesc: Upload an image of your process landscape (e.g. turtle diagram, process map). AI will analyze it and extract your processes automatically.
csr.noProcessesExtracted: No processes could be extracted from the image. Please try a clearer image or enter processes manually.
csr.step2DescWithImage: Processes extracted from your image are shown below. You can edit, add, or remove processes as needed.
csr.uploadProcessMap: Click or drag to upload your process map
csr.imageTypeError: Unsupported file format. Please use PNG, JPG, or WEBP.
csr.imageSizeError: File is too large. Maximum size is 5 MB.
csr.imageReadError: Could not read the file. Please try again.
csr.generatingMatrixAI: AI is analyzing your CSR requirements and mapping processes…
csr.aiPoweredBanner: Matrix generated using AI-powered analysis for intelligent process mapping and risk assessment.
csr.staticFallbackBanner: Matrix generated using static rule-based mapping. Configure AI keys for intelligent analysis.
csr.refreshDataDesc: Use AI to check for the latest IATF sanctioned interpretations and OEM CSR document updates.
csr.refreshResult: {updates} potential update(s) found, {sis} sanctioned interpretation(s) identified.
csr.matrixSummary: {rows} requirements across {oems} OEM(s) mapped to {processes} process(es).
csr.unmappedWarning: {count} requirement(s) not mapped to any process.
csr.unmappedHint: These requirements may not match your process map. They will still appear in the Excel with no process marked.
csr.conflictsDetected: {count} conflict(s) detected between OEMs on the same IATF chapter.
csr.conflictsHint: Conflicts are highlighted in the preview and exported to a dedicated 'Overlaps & Conflicts' tab in the Excel.
csr.matrixPreviewDesc: Showing {showing} of {total} rows. The full matrix will be included in the Excel export.
csr.manualEntryHint: Hint: Document Reference and Document Path must be entered manually for your specific QMS records.
csr.regenerationHint: Important: If you changed the application language, click 'Regenerate' to update the AI-generated recommendation rules to the new language.
csr.exportDesc: Your audit-ready CSR matrix is ready for download as an Excel file (.xlsx) or a PDF summary. The files are professionally formatted and can be used directly.
csr.expiryNotice: No data is stored on our servers. The matrix is generated on-the-fly from your input. You can re-download as long as your session is active (24h).
csr.languageDialogDesc: Select the language for this exported file. AI translation is only used for the download copy when needed.
csr.companyLogoDesc: Upload your company logo to include it on the Excel and PDF cover page. PNG, JPG, SVG — max 2 MB.
csr.deltaDesc: Compare the current matrix with the last known OEM CSR versions to see new, updated, and removed requirements.
csr.deltaNone: No differences found — your matrix is up to date.
csr.implTrackingDesc: Implementation status will be exported in the Excel. You can set the status per requirement in the preview table above.

validation.futureDate: The date must be in the future.
